idea-plugin.name: Atlin Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Full language support for the Atlin (.atlin) key-value data format inside JetBrains IDEs (PhpStorm, IntelliJ IDEA, and others).

Atlin is a minimal, human-friendly data format for key-value content.
Learn more: Atlin Format — Official Article
Source code: GitHub Repository

Features

  • Syntax Highlighting — Keys, values, and comments are highlighted with distinct colors.
  • Separator Highlighting — Blank lines before keys get a background color to visually separate entries.
  • Multiline Values — Values spanning multiple lines are fully supported, including Emoji.
  • Configurable Key Prefix — Default prefix is @, but you can change it to any character (e.g. |) via Settings.
  • Code Folding — Multiline values can be folded and unfolded in the editor.
  • Autocomplete — Suggests existing keys from the current file while typing.
  • Validation — Shows an error for empty key names and a warning when a key does not start with the configured prefix.
  • Customizable Colors — All highlighting colors are configurable via Settings → Editor → Color Scheme → Atlin.
  • Bundled Color Schemes — Includes default schemes for both light and Darcula themes.

Atlin Format Overview

        # This is a comment

        @name
        Hdi Akbarzadeh

        @bio
        A software developer.
        Loves clean code.

        @skills
        PHP, Java, JavaScript

Configuration

Go to Settings → Editor → Atlin to change the key prefix character.
Go to Settings → Editor → Color Scheme → Atlin to customize all highlight colors.
